description: Mock renewal application: a Dubai-registered private vehicle (plate C 34966 DUBAI) renewed by its owner (Ahmed Al Mansoori), opting into the paid plate-design change extra (bilingual front / bordered-standard back style) and choosing courier delivery of the new registration card to a Dubai address, with a re-entered confirmation email. All values are fabricated illustrative data (not a real plate number, address, phone, or email), constructed to exercise the courier_to_door branch's full field set. Two sibling scenarios (RTA office collection, kiosk collection) were also run during authoring — see VERIFICATION.md's 'Mock test run' section for all three — but only this courier scenario is committed here, matching this registry's convention of committing one representative packet per document.
